description:
Homelab Overview. 
Benötigt: Node Exporter auf Hosts, Pi-hole Exporter.

spec.expr: (node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/mnt/vault", fstype!="tmpfs"} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/mnt/vault", fstype!="tmpfs"}) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/mnt/vault", fstype!="tmpfs"} * 100

(node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/mnt/backup", fstype!="tmpfs"} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/mnt/backup", fstype!="tmpfs"}) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/mnt/backup", fstype!="tmpfs"} * 100

(node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/", fstype!="tmpfs"} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/", fstype!="tmpfs"}) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/", fstype!="tmpfs"} * 100

(node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance="boreas", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance="boreas", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"}) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance="boreas", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} * 100

(node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance="hephaestus", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance="hephaestus", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"}) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance="hephaestus", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} * 100

spec.description: Per-service backup status: 0 = OK, 1 = FAIL, 2 = SKIP (no changes detected)
spec.title: 📊 Backup Service Status

spec.description: Size of each backup archive. Thresholds: yellow = 1 GB, orange = 10 GB, red = 30 GB.
spec.title: 📦 Archive Sizes by Service

spec.description: Backup step runtime per service. Thresholds: yellow = 60s, orange = 5min, red = 10min.
spec.title: ⏱️ Step Duration by Service

spec.description: Result of the last verify-backup.sh run. Shows number of failed checks (0 = all passed).
spec.title: 🔍 Verify Result

spec.description: Number of services skipped because no files changed since last backup.
spec.title: ⊘ Skipped

spec.description: Free space on /mnt/backup as reported by backup-services.sh at run time.
spec.title: 💿 Backup Disk Free

spec.description: Archive size per service over time. A rising nextcloud line is the early warning for a full backup disk.
spec.title: 📈 Archive Size Over Time

spec.expr: (node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance="zephyros", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance="zephyros", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"}) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance="zephyros", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"} * 100

(node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/mnt/codex", fstype!="tmpfs"} - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/mnt/codex", fstype!="tmpfs"}) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=~"$mnemosyne_host", mountpoint="/mnt/codex", fstype!="tmpfs"} * 100

title: 01_01_Homelab_Overview
